Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Requests For The Production Of Documents To Deft Richard Ashley; Request For Monetary Sanctions Under Ccp 2023(B)
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff R Randall Riccardo's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions, and Requests For The Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is denied as to Special Interrogatory Numbers 3, 4, 5, 16 as overly broad and irrelevant.
The motion is denied as to Special Interrogatory Numbers 6, 12, and 18 as the responses are adequate.
The motion is granted as to Special Interrogatory Number 11.
The motion is denied as to Request for Production of Documents Numbers 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 10, 12, 13, 14, 16, 17, 18, 19 as overly broad and irrelevant.
The motion is denied as to Request for Production of Documents Number 4 as tax returns are privileged and the request is overly broad.
The motion is granted as to Request for Production of Documents Numbers 7, 8, 9, and 15.
The motion is denied as to Request for Production of Documents Numbers 20, 23, 24, 25, 26, 28, 31, 32, 33, and 34 as they are irrelevant, protected by the right to privacy, and overly broad.
The motion is granted as to Request For Admissions Numbers 7 and 16 as the objections are overruled. The responses otherwise are adequate.
The motion is denied as to Request For Admissions Numbers 9, 11, and 12. The responses are adequate.
Sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Requests For The Production Of Documents To Deft Richard Ashley; Request For Monetary Sanctions Under Ccp 2023(B);

MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff's motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Requests For The Production Of Documents To Deft Richard Ashley; Request For Monetary Sanctions Under Ccp 2023(B) is continued to April 8, 2008 at 10:30 a.m. per request of moving party. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanction;
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff R. Randall Riccardo's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Be Deemed Admitted is denied as responses have been served. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $590, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Defendant's objections to evidence are overruled. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
